name: create-luke-content
description: Write any content in Luke Rhodes' authentic voice (Diolog CTO and co-founder), conditionally routed through the right persona variant for the content type: LinkedIn posts and long-form blog articles (engagement-optimised, with a Diolog graphic concept), marketing content (announcements, release notes, landing copy, campaign emails), code reviews (severity-calibrated candour), informal-but-professional Slack messages, short-form content (tweets, comments, bios), and ADHD-targetted / book-audience writing (the conversational brilliant-colleague register). One non-negotiable base voice (calm, direct, technically fluent, quietly witty, no em dashes, no AI clichés) synthesised from Luke's raw writing corpus, five persona deltas layered on top, and a deterministic voice-lint with per-format advisory checks. Formerly create-luke-article. v2.3 ports the owner-review learnings from the Amy package: signature-phrase rations with a retired-list mechanism, distribution-not-formula rhythm, referent discipline, peer-audience floor, genuine-question-or-no-question closes, register fencing, and a self-narrating meta-label ban (lint-enforced). v2.3.2 refreshes the bundled AI-signs field guide with the July 2026 empirical research layer. v2.3.3 syncs the field guide's once-per-document epigram/contrast rule. v2.4 syncs the repeated-phrase lint check and the updated field guide (countable texture budgets, scaffold-slot trap). v2.4.1 field-guide sync. v2.4.2 lint pattern sync. v2.4.3 lint sync (quiet-claim advisories).
